name: Abandoned Cart Recovery
problem: High cart abandonment rates on e-commerce store with no follow-up.
solution: Listen for abandoned cart webhooks, wait 1 hour, check if purchased, send targeted discount email via SendGrid.

name: Social Media Cross-Posting
problem: Manually posting the same content across Twitter, LinkedIn, and Facebook wastes time.
solution: Trigger on new RSS feed item, format message with OpenAI, post to Buffer API for distribution.

name: Lead Enrichment from Forms
problem: Inbound leads only provide email addresses, making qualification difficult.
solution: Trigger on form submission, query Clearbit API for company data, update HubSpot CRM.

name: Competitor Pricing Alert
problem: Competitors change prices without us knowing, leading to lost sales.
solution: Daily cron, scrape competitor pricing page, compare to DB, alert Slack channel if changed.

name: Webinar Attendee Follow-up
problem: No automated follow-up for users who attended but didn't convert.
solution: Zoom webhook for webinar end, cross-reference CRM for deals, send personalized outreach sequence.

name: Contract Expiry Notification
problem: Sales team misses renewal dates, resulting in churn.
solution: Daily cron queries Salesforce for contracts expiring in 30 days, creates task for Account Manager, sends email.

name: High-Intent Page Visitor Alert
problem: Sales reps don't know when a hot lead visits the pricing page.
solution: Listen to segment events, filter for 'pricing' and 'logged in', alert account owner in Slack immediately.

name: Automated Proposal Generation
problem: Manually typing proposals takes hours per prospect.
solution: Trigger when deal reaches 'Proposal' stage, fetch CRM data, populate Google Doc template, generate PDF, email.

name: Stale Lead Re-engagement
problem: Thousands of cold leads sit in the database with zero touchpoints.
solution: Monthly cron queries leads untouched > 90 days, sends re-engagement plain-text email sequence.

name: Post-Demo Feedback Loop
problem: Sales managers have no visibility into how demos went.
solution: Trigger 1 hr after calendar event 'Demo', send Typeform survey to prospect, push results to Slack channel.

name: VIP Ticket Escalation
problem: High-paying enterprise clients wait in the general support queue.
solution: Intercom webhook, check customer tier in Stripe, if Enterprise, route to PagerDuty and VIP Slack channel.

name: Automated Refund Processing
problem: Issuing refunds takes multiple manual steps across Stripe and helpdesk.
solution: Tag 'Refund Approved' in Zendesk, trigger workflow to issue Stripe refund, update ticket, email customer.

name: Negative Review Auto-Triage
problem: 1-star reviews go unnoticed for days.
solution: Monitor Trustpilot RSS/API, if 1 or 2 stars, create urgent Jira ticket, alert Customer Success Manager.

name: Multilingual Support Translation
problem: Support agents can't read tickets in foreign languages.
solution: Ticket created webhook, use Google Translate API to detect and translate to English, add internal note to ticket.

name: SLA Breach Auto-Escalation
problem: Tickets sit unanswered past the 24-hour SLA.
solution: Hourly cron queries tickets open > 24hrs without response, assigns to Support Manager, increases priority.

name: Expense Receipt OCR
problem: Employees submit blurry receipts, slowing down reimbursements.
solution: Email trigger with attachment, AWS Textract extracts amount/merchant, logs to Google Sheets, alerts approver.

name: Failed Payment Dunning
problem: Credit cards fail and subscriptions cancel due to lack of follow-up.
solution: Stripe 'charge.failed' webhook, wait 2 days, retry, if fail again send reminder email sequence.

name: Daily Cash Balance Report
problem: CFO has to manually check 3 bank accounts every morning.
solution: Daily cron, fetch balances via Plaid API, aggregate data, send SMS to CFO.

name: New Vendor Onboarding
problem: Collecting W-9s and payment info is scattered in email.
solution: Form submission, create vendor in ERP (NetSuite), send DocuSign for W-9, notify Finance when signed.

name: Crypto Payment Reconciliation
problem: Crypto invoice payments require manual matching on block explorers.
solution: Coinbase Commerce webhook, find matching invoice ID in Xero, mark as paid.

name: Employee Offboarding Revocation
problem: Terminated employees retain access to SaaS apps causing security risks.
solution: Workday termination webhook, trigger Okta deprovisioning, remove from GitHub, remove from Slack.

name: Candidate Interview Reminders
problem: Candidates miss interviews due to forgotten calendar invites.
solution: Cron checks ATS for interviews next day, sends automated SMS and email reminder.

name: New Hire Swag Fulfillment
problem: HR forgets to send t-shirts to new remote hires.
solution: When candidate marked 'Hired', send Typeform for shirt size/address, upon completion trigger Printful API.

name: PTO Approval Sync
problem: Approved PTO in HRIS isn't reflected on Google Calendar/Slack.
solution: Gusto PTO approved webhook, create 'OOO' event on Google Calendar, set Slack status to '🌴'.

name: Employee Birthday Celebrations
problem: HR misses employee birthdays causing morale dips.
solution: Daily cron checks HRIS for birthdays matching today, posts congratulatory GIF in general Slack channel.

name: Server Outage Remediation
problem: Servers crash in the middle of the night and require manual restart.
solution: Datadog critical alert webhook, trigger AWS Lambda to reboot EC2 instance, log to Jira.

name: Shadow IT Detection
problem: Employees sign up for unauthorized apps using company email.
solution: Monitor Google Workspace admin logs, if OAuth grant to unapproved app, email IT security and revoke.

name: Database Backup Verification
problem: Backups run but no one checks if the file size is valid.
solution: Trigger after backup script finishes, check AWS S3 file size, if < 1GB alert engineering channel.

name: Hardware Lifecycle Replacement
problem: Laptops expire warranty but IT isn't tracking them.
solution: Monthly cron queries MDM (Jamf) for devices > 3 years old, auto-creates Jira tickets to replace.

name: New Domain DNS Setup
problem: Configuring DNS records for new marketing domains is tedious.
solution: Form submitted with domain name, call Cloudflare API to provision standard MX/TXT records.

name: Jira to GitHub Sync
problem: Product managers use Jira but devs use GitHub, causing siloes.
solution: Jira issue created webhook, create matching GitHub issue, paste GitHub link back to Jira.

name: Feature Request Aggregation
problem: User requests are scattered across Intercom, email, and Twitter.
solution: Zapier/n8n webhook receives requests from multiple sources, uses AI to extract core feature, adds to Productboard.

name: App Store Review Alerts
problem: New iOS app reviews aren't monitored in real-time.
solution: App Store RSS feed trigger, if review < 3 stars, translate to English, post to #product-feedback Slack.

name: Release Notes Generation
problem: Writing release notes manually takes hours.
solution: Trigger on GitHub release, fetch merged PR descriptions, use LLM to summarize into user-friendly notes, email users.

name: Beta Tester Invite Automation
problem: Managing TestFlight invites is a manual spreadsheet process.
solution: User fills out beta form, add to Airtable, trigger Apple App Store Connect API to invite user.

name: NDA Counter-Signature
problem: Sales reps send NDAs but legal forgets to sign their half.
solution: DocuSign completed by prospect webhook, auto-route to Legal GC for counter-signature, save to Box.

name: Privacy Request (DSAR) Deletion
problem: GDPR deletion requests are manual and prone to missing databases.
solution: Data deletion form submitted, query CRM, Helpdesk, and Mailchimp, delete user from all 3, email confirmation.

name: Contract Clause Flagging
problem: Non-standard clauses in incoming vendor contracts are missed.
solution: Email with contract attachment, Document AI extracts text, scans for 'unlimited liability', flags to legal.

name: Low Stock Hidden Item
problem: Items run out of stock but remain visible on Shopify.
solution: Shopify inventory webhook, if quantity == 0, update product status to draft.

name: Fraudulent Order Cancellation
problem: High-risk orders slip through and cost chargebacks.
solution: Stripe radar high-risk webhook, immediately cancel order in Shopify, refund payment, ban customer email.

name: Post-Purchase Upsell
problem: Customers buy printers but aren't offered ink.
solution: Order paid webhook, if items include 'Printer', wait 3 days, send email offering 10% off ink.

name: Shipping Delay Notification
problem: Carriers delay shipments and customers complain.
solution: Daily cron checks Shippo/Easypost for 'delayed' status, sends proactive apology SMS to customer.

name: Facility Temperature Alert
problem: Server room or warehouse HVAC fails, ruining inventory.
solution: IoT temp sensor webhook, if > 80F, trigger alarm, call facility manager via Twilio Voice.

name: Vehicle Fleet Mileage Tracker
problem: Manual mileage logging for delivery vehicles is inaccurate.
solution: Geotab/Telematics API daily pull, log daily distance to Google Sheets, if > 10,000 miles, schedule maintenance.

name: Franchise Royalty Calculation
problem: Calculating 5% royalties for 50 franchises is a manual spreadsheet nightmare.
solution: Monthly cron, fetch gross sales from POS API for all locations, calculate 5%, generate Stripe Invoice.

name: Phishing Link Detonation
problem: Employees forward suspicious emails to IT, who manually check links.
solution: Email trigger to security inbox, extract URLs, scan via VirusTotal API, reply with safety status.

name: Failed Login Lockout Alert
problem: Brute force attacks go unnoticed until it's too late.
solution: Okta/Auth0 failed login webhook, if > 10 fails in 5 mins from same IP, block IP in Cloudflare.

name: Public S3 Bucket Detection
problem: Developers accidentally make AWS S3 buckets public.
solution: AWS CloudTrail webhook for PutBucketAcl, check if 'PublicRead', if true, revert to private and alert SecOps.

name: Client Proposal to Project Sync
problem: When a client signs a proposal, the project board must be set up manually.
solution: PandaDoc signature webhook, create Asana Project from template, create Slack channel, invite client.

name: Automated Time Tracking Invoicing
problem: Freelancers forget to bill for logged hours.
solution: End of month cron, aggregate Toggl hours for client, generate Invoice in QuickBooks, send via email.
